mapper.update: UPDATE order_master SET delivery_id = #{riderId}, order_status = 2 WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND order_status = 1 AND delivery_id IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_master ( order_id, user_id, merchant_id, address_id, order_type, total_amount, delivery_fee, note, order_status, pay_type, pay_channel, post_fee, pay_money,mainOrderNo,delivery_time_type ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{addressId}, #{orderType}, #{totalAmount}, #{deliveryFee}, #{note}, #{orderStatus}, #{payType}, #{payChannel}, #{postFee}, #{payMoney}, #{mainOrderNo}, #{deliveryTimeType} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM order_master WHERE order_status = 1 AND delivery_id IS NULL
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM order_master WHERE order_id IN
#{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT om.delivery_id AS riderId, COUNT(om.order_id) AS orderNum, SUM(om.pay_money) AS totalAmount FROM order_master om WHERE om.order_status IN (4,6) AND om.pay_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND om.delivery_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY om.delivery_id
